creator: andrew@kspu.kr.ua
text:
Hello.

I have 
MSI K9N Ultra,
CPU - AMD Athlon 64X2 Dual 4000
HDD - ST3250310AS

After installing 7.0R I've got:

---
can't exec /bin/sh for /etc/rc: Exec format error

or

/libexec/ld-elf.so.1: /lib/libcrypto.so.5: invalid file format

or 

./configure 
 Segmentation fault (core dumped)

or etc...
---

7.0-CURRENT-200702 works fine exept some minor things.
Other machines works good under 7.0-CURRENT-200702  and 7.0-RELEASE
